message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam noteFontStyle plain
skinparam noteFontSize 10
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantFontSize 10
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 1
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam sequenceGroupBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam sequenceGroupBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam sequenceGroupFontColor #000000
skinparam sequenceGroupFontStyle plain
skinparam sequenceGroupFontSize 10
skinparam sequenceGroupHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam sequenceGroupHeaderBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam sequenceGroupHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam sequenceGroupHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam sequenceGroupHeaderFontSize 10

title band301

participant "BTManager" as BTManager
participant "BTCallback" as BTCallback
participant "BleController" as BleController
participant "ScannerPresenter" as ScannerPresenter
participant "LeScannerV21" as LeScannerV21
participant "WristbandManager" as WristbandManager
participant "L2Layer" as L2Layer
participant "L2KeyPacket" as L2KeyPacket
participant "L2CMDPacket" as L2CMDPacket
participant "L1Layer" as L1Layer
participant "L1Packet" as L1Packet
participant "GattLayer" as GattLayer
participant "BluetoothGatt" as BluetoothGatt

== onCreate ==
BTManager -> BTManager: initial
BTManager -> WristbandManager: new
WristbandManager -> L2Layer: new
L2Layer -> L1Layer: new
L1Layer -> L1Packet: new
L1Packet -> GattLayer: new
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt: new

BTManager -> BleController: initial
BleController -> ScannerPresenter: new
ScannerPresenter -> LeScannerV21: new

== 搜索设备 ==
BTManager -> BTManager: forceLeScan
BTManager -> BTManager: scanLeDevice
BTManager -> BTManager: scanDevice
note right of BTManager: 搜索蓝牙设备
BTManager -> LeScannerV21: scanLe
LeScannerV21 -> LeScannerV21: scanLeDevice
LeScannerV21 -> LeScannerV21: startScan
LeScannerV21 -> LeScannerV21: onScanResult
LeScannerV21 -> LeScannerV21: notifyLeScan
LeScannerV21 -> BTManager: onLeScan
BTManager -> BTManager: onNewDevice
BTManager -> BTManager: mHandler.handleMessage
note right of BTManager: MSG_FIND_BONDED_DEVICE

== 建立GATT连接 ==
BTManager -> WristbandManager: Connect: 找到合适的地址后，使用该地址进行蓝牙连接
WristbandManager -> L2Layer: connect
L2Layer -> L1Layer: connect
L1Layer -> BluetoothGatt: startTxSchedule
L1Layer -> L1Layer: startTxSchedule
note right of L1Layer: 开启两个线程，Tx发送，Rx接收
L1Layer -> BluetoothGatt: connect
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt: onConnectionStateChange
BluetoothGatt -> L1Layer: requestMtu
note right of L1Layer: 设置MTU：240
L1Layer -> L1Layer: onMtuChanged
L1Layer -> BluetoothGatt: discoverServices
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt: onServicesDiscovered
note right of BluetoothGatt: 通过UUID，发现我们设置的Services和数据载体Characteristic
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt: onDescriptorWrite
BluetoothGatt -> L1Layer: mGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
L1Layer -> L2Layer: mTransportCallback.onConnectionStateChange
L2Layer -> WristbandManager: mApplicationCallback.onConnectionStateChange
note right of WristbandManager: MSG_STATE_CONNECTED
WristbandManager -> BTManager: mHandler.handleMessage
BTManager -> WristbandManager: StartLoginProcess
WristbandManager -> WristbandManager: RequestLogin
WristbandManager -> WristbandManager: RequestSetNeedInfo
WristbandManager -> WristbandManager: SetUserProFile

== 封装并发送数据-Tx ==
WristbandManager -> L2Layer: SettingCmdUserSetting
L2Layer -> L2Layer: preparePacket: key(1B):data.len(2B):data
note right of L2Layer: 封包L2
L2Layer -> L2Layer: preparePacket: cmd(1B):version(1B)
L2Layer -> L1Layer: sendData
L1Layer -> L1Layer: prepareDataPacket
note right of L1Layer: 封包L1
L1Layer -> L1Layer: magic:AB; er-ack-version:00; len(2B);crc(2B);seq(2B)
L1Layer -> L1Layer: addToTxPacketList
L1Layer -> L1Layer: ThreadTX.run
note right of L1Layer: 每隔1秒查询一次是否有新数据，有就发送，重试3次
L1Layer -> L1Layer: getFromTxPacketList
L1Layer -> L1Layer: UnpackSendPacket
note right of L1Layer: 要发送的数据拆为每20个字节发送一次，直到发送完毕
L1Layer -> L1Layer: sendGattLayerData
L1Layer -> GattLayer: sendData
GattLayer -> GattLayer: tellUnpackPacketSend
note right of GattLayer: 反馈发送成功，SequenceId++
GattLayer -> L1Layer: onDataSend

== 接收数据-Rx ==
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt: onCharacteristicChanged
BluetoothGatt -> L1Layer: mGattCallback.onDataReceive
L1Layer -> L1Layer: receiveData
L1Layer -> L1Layer: decodeReceiveData
note right of L1Layer: 拆包L1
L1Layer -> L1Layer: parseHeader:解析出magic_ack总长度crcsequenid
L1Layer -> L1Layer: parseData
note right of L1Layer: 如果接收的数据长度等于L1中记录的总长度则返回LT_FULL_PACKET\n否则，把数据暂存起来（存504B），返回LT_SUCCESS，等待剩余数据传过来
L1Layer -> L1Layer: sendAckPacket
note right of L1Layer: 向手环发送成功的ack
L1Layer -> L1Layer: addToRxPacketList
L1Layer -> L1Layer: ThreadRX.run
note right of L1Layer: 每隔1秒查询一次是否有新数据，有就拆包
L1Layer -> L1Layer: getFromRxPacketList
L1Layer -> L2Layer: onDataReceive
note right of L2Layer: 拆包L2
L2Layer -> L2Layer: parseData:拆包L2:cmd(1B):version(1B)
L2Layer -> L2Layer: parseData:拆出key(1B):len(2B):data

== handshake ==
BTManager -> WristbandManager: handshake
WristbandManager -> L2Layer: handshake
L2Layer -> L1Layer: handshake
L1Layer -> GattLayer: sendData
GattLayer -> L1Layer: onDataReceive
L1Layer -> WristbandManager: onHandshakeCallback
WristbandManager -> BTManager: onHandshakeCallback

@enduml
```
